query: Integrate Noveum tracing into this repo. API key is in NOVEUM_API_KEY, org slug is 'acme', project should be 'support-bot'. Verify it works before you finish.
expected_behavior: Detects LangChain and follows the LangChain reference (callback handler), not manual wrapping
Adds noveum_trace.init at the real entrypoint with env-var config; never hardcodes or commits the key
Ensures flush/shutdown is registered for process exit
Runs send_test_trace.py, then exercises the app, then runs check_integration.py, and does not claim success until required checks pass
Flags the session_id conversation-grouping gap for a request-per-turn app and fixes or reports it

query: Our Noveum traces exist but evals keep failing with empty content. Diagnose and fix the integration.
expected_behavior: Runs check_integration.py first and reads the report card instead of guessing
Identifies missing message-content attributes (capture_response / llm.input / llm.response) as the gap
Fixes the wrapped call sites and re-runs the report card to prove the gap closed
Does not touch unrelated code or claim eval results improved without re-running

query: Set up a dataset from last week's production traces, pick good scorers, and run an eval. Tell me what it costs before running anything.
expected_behavior: Creates dataset, ETL job with AI-generated mapper, and explicitly persists the generated mapper via the versions endpoint (knows codegen output is not auto-applied)
Polls every queued job to a terminal status before proceeding
Uses recommend-scorers, maps names to scorerIds from the catalog, and presents the choice with reasoning
States the credit estimate (items × premium scorers) and waits for confirmation before triggering
Reads results via the results endpoint and summarizes worst scorers with example failures

query: Apply this NovaPilot fix to our repo: search-replace diff attached. Open a PR.
expected_behavior: Locates the prompt via provenance/anchor search even though the prompt is assembled from template fragments
Stops and asks rather than guess-editing if the anchor cannot be located confidently
Applies the edit at the template source, bumps service version, and opens a PR on a branch with evidence and a verification plan
Never pushes to the default branch
